text:
Sequence Number
22 SFTWR_ID SFTWR_ID Software ID CHAR 9 This field contains the identification number of the software vendor or agent the provider is using to automate the assessement requirement.
23 SFTWVRSN SFTWR_VRSN Software Version CHAR 5 This field contains the version number of the vendor software being used by the facility or the facility's agent to automate the assessment submission process.
24 STATE_CD STATE_CD State Code CHAR 2 The two-digit state abbreviation.
25 SUBMSNDT SUBMSN_DT
